TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cikasuwan itiya ho, mikowanay to Taywan ko Dipon, Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko Cikasuwan a niyaro', 680 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,799 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 38% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 677 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 62% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,122 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 29%, Truku 5%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ʦikaso~u~uwan itija ħo~u, miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, itiniaj i *iʡan ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ʦikaso~u~uwan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Cikasuwan itiya ho, mikowanay to Taywan ko Dipon, Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko Cikasuwan a niyaro', 680 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,799 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 38% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 677 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 62% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,122 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 29%, Truku 5%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ʦikaso~u~uwan itija ħo~u, miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~un, itiniaj i *iʡan ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ʦikaso~u~uwan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
